Package org.apache.juneau.http

Class FormatType

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.http.FormatType
public class FormatType extends Object
Static strings used for Swagger parameter format types.
See Also:
  • Swagger 2.0 Data Types
  • OpenAPI 3.0 Data Types

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    BINARY
    Binary data (octet stream).
    static final String
    BYTE
    Base64-encoded characters.
    static final String
    DATE
    Full-date notation as defined by RFC 3339, section 5.6 (e.g., "2017-07-21").
    static final String
    DATE_TIME
    Date-time notation as defined by RFC 3339, section 5.6 (e.g., "2017-07-21T17:32:28Z").
    static final String
    DOUBLE
    Double precision floating point number.
    static final String
    FLOAT
    Single precision floating point number.
    static final String
    INT32
    Signed 32-bit integer format.
    static final String
    INT64
    Signed 64-bit integer format (long).
    static final String
    PASSWORD
    Password input - hints UIs to mask the input.
    static final String
    UON
    UON (URL-Encoding Object Notation) - Juneau-specific format.
